title: Monday's ETF Movers: BLOK, TAN
content:
In trading on Monday, the Amplify Transformational Data Sharing ETF is outperforming other ETFs, up about 1.4% on the day.  Components of that ETF showing particular strength include shares of Orion Digital, up about 7.5% and shares of Strategy, up about 6.3% on the day.

And underperforming other ETFs today is the Invesco Solar ETF, off about 1.3% in Monday afternoon trading. Among components of that ETF with the weakest showing on Monday were shares of Solaredge Technologies, lower by about 7.3%, and shares of Nextpower, lower by about 4.2% on the day.

VIDEO: Monday's ETF Movers: BLOK, TAN
